content:
✅ Why This Works:
• Encourages deeper investment in the role-playing mechanics.
• Prevents students from “gaming the system” by switching strategies late.
• Adds hidden consequences and rewards based on playstyle.

📜 3. Ensuring XP Caps Apply to All Unlocks

📜 Now, all XP-based rewards, items, and rerolls follow strict cap rules.

✔ Each item tier has a hard limit (1 Gold, 2 Silver, 3 Bronze per week).
✔ Only a set number of rerolls are available per semester.
✔ Final challenge paths are limited based on prior engagement.

📜 New Rule: Weekly “Rush for the Prize”
✔ Every Friday at noon, all students see the XP store’s weekly unlocks.
✔ The first to claim items get them—once gone, they’re gone.
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 249 (chunk 249/555)
